heading: Recommended Project Structure
items: app/ — All of your application code lives here.
app/__init__.py — The app factory. This file creates and configures your Flask app. Python uses this file to recognize the folder as a package.
app/api/ — Your route blueprints (endpoints). Each file handles a group of related URLs.
app/services/ — Business logic. Functions that do the actual work (reading files, calculating things, processing data).
app/utils/ — Helper functions that are used across multiple parts of your app.
data/ — JSON files or other data storage. This is where you keep your application data.
venv/ — Your virtual environment (created automatically, never edit this).
requirements.txt — A list of all the Python libraries your project needs. Like package.json for Python.
run.py — The entry point that starts your application.
